revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Portal/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
rename class to portalbox so that it will work on mobile
float should be specified by tright/tleft, not this class
remove restrictive must be child selector between class and ul
fix line height bug caused by adding plainlist module
move background up into portalbox class
fix mobile layout: make small-screen adaptive
change HTML to use <ul> and <li> to show semantics of portal list
set min height of row to avoid bunching
would be better to just leave it to variables here, transparent background isn't really necessary

Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Portal/styles.css]]": Up to full due to 9 million transclusions - the image modules are split by letter and can stay TPE ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 21 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Portal/styles.css]]
